title: Semijoin returns duplicate values from a column with unique values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE dict (value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
INSERT INTO dict SELECT number FROM numbers(2050);
CREATE TABLE t (i Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY i;
INSERT INTO t SELECT value FROM dict WHERE value % 2 = 0;
SELECT d.value FROM dict d INNER JOIN t ON d.value = t.i;
key_bug_features: Semijoin returns duplicates from unique column values
